name: floatzel
flavor_texts: It floats using its well-developed flotation sac. It assists in the rescues of drowning people.
Its flotation sac developed as a result of pursuing aquatic prey. It can double as a rubber raft.
It is a common sight around fishing ports. It is known to rescue people and carry off prey.
With its flotation sac inflated, it can carry people on its back. It deflates the sac before it dives.
Has a long, rather splendid flotation sac, which prevents Floatzel from drowning even in stormy seas. One might glimpse this species around fishing hamlets from time to time.
text: Floatzel is the Sea Weasel Pokémon. It is a water-type Pokémon. Abilities: swift-swim, water-veil (hidden). Base stats — HP: 85, Attack: 105, Defense: 55, Sp. Atk: 85, Sp. Def: 50, Speed: 115. Evolution line: buizel → floatzel. Lore: It floats using its well-developed flotation sac. It assists in the rescues of drowning people. Its flotation sac developed as a result of pursuing aquatic prey. It can double as a rubber raft. It is a common sight around fishing ports. It is known to rescue people and carry off prey. With its flotation sac inflated, it can carry people on its back. It deflates the sac before it dives. Has a long, rather splendid flotation sac, which prevents Floatzel from drowning even in stormy seas. One might glimpse this species around fishing hamlets from time to time.
